steps.title: Evaluate the shared inputs
steps.content: The answer choices all use $x=-1$, $0$, and $1$. Substitute each value into $q(x)=32(2^x)$.

steps.title: Read the output row
steps.content:
The values are:
$$q(-1)=16,\quad q(0)=32,\quad q(1)=64$$
So the correct table must have output row $16,32,64$.

steps.title: Match the table
steps.content: The correct table pairs $x=-1$, $0$, and $1$ with $q(x)=16$, $32$, and $64$, respectively. Therefore D is correct.
